title: platostoma coeruleum
intro: Platostoma coeruleum, also known as blue dragon or blue shiso, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Platostoma coeruleum include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and providing pain relief, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The plant is often prepared for medicinal use through methods such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be administered orally or topically to harness its therapeutic properties.
